text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Forgive me, Trainer. This injury is of my own
wrongdoing...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Of course, this is but a trifle. It is nowhere near
capable of halting my advance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However... I have let you become enshrouded
with a gloom.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I, who have sworn to bring light to all, have cast a
shadow on your heart—you, the person closest to
me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to help you! My stride is still strong, this
injury notwithstanding!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will bring peace to your troubled heart—you
have my word!
choice_data_list: Sounds good. Let's take a break then.
Sounds good. Let's take a break then.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will bring peace to your troubled heart—you
have my word!
choice_data_list: Sounds good. Let's take a break then.
Sounds good. Let's take a break then.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
H-have you not been listening?! In order to put
you at ease, I...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Aha! I see what you're implying.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You wish to become my sanctuary. It would bring
you the highest of joys... Yes?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It vexes me to take a pause in our onward march,
but this, too, is my royal duty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O seems to realize how much is riding
on her shoulders and takes a rest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right about me being worried. I can only rest
assured if she's in good condition!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! Now, let us venture outdoors where
we—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: THE PAIN!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Hehehe... I-it seems the gods... are more
jealous of you than... I had imagined...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: This guilt... is too much... to bear! Collapse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must have committed another wrongdoing
somehow. I rush over to help her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right about me being worried. I can only rest
assured if she's in good condition!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Excellent! Now, let us venture outdoors...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Well? What did you think of my stride?
Not a notch shy of brilliant, yes?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, as I thought! Your feelings come
through loud and clear.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
By the sight of my run, you have been moved to
your core. Filled with joy, you are at the brink of
tears!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There is no need for gratitude! As I said, I already
know your feelings.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes! There, in your smile!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are a few things I could say to her, perhaps
to curb her vanity. But I suppose I can be content
that she's healthy and in good spirits.
